explainability_method: SHAP TreeExplainer on XGBoost fused model
risk_score_scale: 0-100 percentile-calibrated across the MSME portfolio; same scale can be applied per-segment for cross-segment comparability
note: This SHAP layer is the 'common interpretation framework' required by the PS - every prediction, regardless of segment/model, resolves to the same 0-100 score + a ranked list of plain-language reasons.
